_description: Wave 198: spider-dispatches running bit. ~38s. Status: SCRIPT BANKED, video_url fields are TODO. The visual joke: Spider in increasingly improbable locations, all photographed seriously.
title: Spider Files From the Field

voiceover.instructions: Deadpan documentary register. Slow, level, slightly weary.

segments.name: title_open
segments.text:
FIELD DISPATCHES

From the Staff Photographer
at large
segments.narration: Field dispatches. From the Staff Photographer at large.
segments.instructions: Documentary opener. 'At large' as a job title, not a punchline.

has met him.
